eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Bee, TX; at 09:21 AM ON APR 2, 2026 Effective until 10:06 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is a TEST of our emergency notification system. This Message is From Bee County & City of Beeville Office of Emergency Management. NO ACTION NEEDED TEST ONLY!!!
